message:
🌱 Add apisix: bug: /status/ready endpoint always returns 503 in mission (#1586)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "apisix-12662-bug-status-ready-endpoint-always-returns-503-in-file-driven-standal",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "apisix: bug: /status/ready endpoint always returns 503 in file-driven standalone mode",
+    "description": "bug: /status/ready endpoint always returns 503 in file-driven standalone mode. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify apisix troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your apisix deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix -n apisix --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review apisix configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant apisix configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix\nkubectl get configmap -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=apisix\n```\n### Current Behavior\n\nWhen running APISIX 3.13.0 in file-driven standalone mode (deployment.role=data_plane, config_provider=yaml), the `/status/ready` health check endpoint always returns HTTP 503 with error \"worker id: X has not received"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for bug: /status/ready endpoint always returns 503 in…",
+        "description": "The status API would not work in standalone mode, this has been fixed.\n```yaml\n{\"error\":\"worker id: 0 has not received configuration\",\"status\":\"error\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm bug: /status/ready endpoint always returns 503 in… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix -n apisix --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n apisix --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The status API would not work in standalone mode, this has been fixed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"error\":\"worker id: 0 has not received configuration\",\"status\":\"error\"}",
+        "2025/01/10 00:41:47 [warn] 33#33: *3 [lua] init.lua:1003: status_ready(): worker id: 0 has not received configuration, context: ngx.timer",
+        "# config.yaml\ndeployment:\n  role: data_plane\n  role_data_plane:\n    config_provider: yaml\napisix:\n  enable_admin: false"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "apisix",
+      "community",
+      "api-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "apisix"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Role"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",

+      "issue": "https://github.com/apache/apisix/issues/12662",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/apache/apisix",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/apache/apisix/pull/12810"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 11,

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
